description: Redesign high-volume support hiring interviews: roundtable flow, time-box, screen for learning and personality when domain tech is trainable, stop process theater that freezes the pipeline.

examples.context: Company building call center. ~300 reps. Roundtables stuck on call-center process detail. Insurance support: tech teachable.
examples.resolution: Personality and learning first. Throughput recovered. Without redesign, hiring would still be running years later.

examples.context: Panel argued book question was soft. Pass group showed stronger ramp curiosity in training.
examples.resolution: Kept learning signal. Soft does not mean useless.

examples.context: Two interviewers yes almost everyone; one yes almost none.
examples.resolution: Three must-haves locked. Calibration meeting. Variance down.
